packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
系统
 • 提升系统稳定性
 • 优化屏幕触控体验
 • 优化分屏体验，三分屏新增支持拖拽替换应用
 • 更新 Android 安全补丁至 2024 年 1 月，提升系统安全性
 • 修复控制中心面板显示异常的问题
 • 下线智能侧边栏听剧模式功能
通信
 • 优化网络连接稳定性
相机
 • 优化相机效果，提升拍摄体验
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
System
 • Improves system stability.
 • Improves touch control experience.
 • You can now drag to replace the current app with a new one in a three-way split view.
 • Integrates the January 2024 Android security patch to enhance system security.
 • Fixes a display issue that might occur in Quick Settings.
 • The Background stream feature in Smart Sidebar has been removed.
Communication
 • Improves the stability of network connections.
Camera
 • Improves camera performance for a better user experience.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
系统
 • 提升系统稳定性
 • 更新触控算法，优化屏幕触控体验
 • 优化待机和部分应用场景下的功耗表现，提升续航体验
 • 更新 Android 安全补丁至 2023 年 12 月，提升系统安全性
通信
 • 优化网络连接稳定性与兼容性
相机
 • 优化关闭夜景开关时的拍照快门动画效果
 • 修复美颜、滤镜、视频分辨率、闪光灯开关点击无反应的问题
 • 修复双屏同显时点击外屏左上角后置自拍后，内屏定屏无反应的问题
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
System
 • Improves system stability.
 • Improves the touch control algorithm for better user experience.
 • Reduces power consumption when the device is idle and when certain apps are in use.
 • Integrates the December 2023 Android security patch to enhance system security.
Communication
 • Improves network stability and compatibility.
Camera
 • Fixes a shutter lag issue that might occur when the Nightscape toggle is turned off.
 • Fixes an issue where the Retouch, Filters, Resolution, and Flash functions might not respond to your taps.
 • Fixes an issue where the main screen might get stuck when you turn on Dual Preview and use the rear camera to take selfies.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
系统
 • 提升系统稳定性
 • 优化部分场景系统流畅性
 • 修复外屏长按微信用户头像响应慢的问题
 • 修复相册编辑时点击消除笔无响应的问题
相机
 • 优化长焦高倍率清晰度
 • 优化拍照模式和专业模式下部分场景的光影和色彩效果
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
System
 • Improves system stability.
 • Improves system performance.
 • Fixes a slow response issue that might occur when you tap and hold a friend's profile photo in WeChat on the cover screen.
 • Fixes an issue where the Eraser tool in Photos might not respond to your taps.
Camera
 • Increases the clarity of photos taken at higher zoom ratios with the telephoto camera.
 • Improves the tone and color accuracy of photos taken in Photo and Pro mode.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
系统
 • 更新 Android 安全补丁至 2023 年 9 月，提升系统安全性
 • 优化应用横屏状态下的分屏体验
 • 优化微信视频号的分屏体验
 • 优化多分屏的使用体验
 • 优化外屏黑屏手势防误触体验
 • 提升内屏触控灵敏度
通信
 • 提升 WLAN 网络连接稳定性与兼容性
 • 提升蓝牙连接稳定性与兼容性
 • 优化红外遥控体验
相机
 • 新增支持调节变焦圆盘时显示镜头等效焦距
 • 新增支持自定义设置默认广角焦段
 • 优化杜比视界视觉效果
 • 优化拍摄预览画面与成片效果一致性
 • 优化长按拍照键录制视频的拍摄体验
 • 优化相机性能，提升整体稳定性
 • 优化视频录制效果
 • 优化后置拍照效果
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
System
 • Integrates the September 2023 Android security patch to enhance system security.
 • Improves the experience of using Split View in landscape mode.
 • Improves the experience of opening WeChat Channels in Split View.
 • Improves the experience of opening three apps in Split View.
 • Fixes an issue where accidental touches might be falsely recognized as Screen-off gestures on cover screen.
 • Optimizes the touch sensitivity of the main screen.
Communication
 • Improves the stability and expands the compatibility of Wi-Fi network connections.
 • Improves the stability and expands the compatibility of Bluetooth connections.
 • Improves the experience of using IR Remote.
Camera
Shows the equivalent focal lengths for zoom options.
 • Default wide-angle focal length can be changed in the camera settings.
 • Improves Dolby Vision effects.
 • Improves the preview thumbnails of photos.
 • Improves the experience of taking videos by tapping and holding the Shutter button.
 • Improves the performance and stability of Camera.
 • Improves video-taking performance.
 • Improves the quality of photos taken using the rear camera.
